bank.retain_mission: Extract identity, trust, governance, blockchain-audit, and zk-stewardship decisions and findings.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about identity model, trust boundaries, audit cadence, and the cryptographic primitives in use. Ignore one-off review comments.

mental_models.name: Trust Boundaries
mental_models.source_query: What is the identity and trust model? Include governance, audit cadence, and known weak links.

mental_models.name: Audit Findings
mental_models.source_query: What recurring findings show up in compliance/blockchain/zk audits, and which fixes have held?
